Fantastic Four (2015)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $56,117,548Details
International Box Office $111,731,639
Worldwide Box Office $167,849,187
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $7,195,571
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $6,400,845
Total $13,596,416
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Four young outsiders teleport to an alternate and dangerous universe, which alters their physical form in shocking ways. Their lives irrevocably upended, the team must learn to harness their daunting new abilities and work together to save Earth from a former friend turned enemy.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$25,685,737 (45.8% of total gross)
Legs:2.18 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:33.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$120,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.4 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,995 opening theaters/4,004 max. theaters, 3.7 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $79,616,357

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: August 7th, 2015 (Wide) by 20th Century Fox
International Releases: August 5th, 2015 (Wide) (France)
August 5th, 2015 (Wide) (Switzerland)
August 5th, 2015 (Wide) (Philippines)
August 6th, 2015 (Wide), released as The Fantastic Four (Australia)
August 6th, 2015 (Wide) (Taiwan)
Video Release: November 20th, 2015 by Fox Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for sci-fi action violence, and language.
(Rating bulletin 2383, 7/22/2015)
Running Time: 100 minutes
Franchise: Fantastic Four
Cast, crew, or production detail: Character POV shot, Development Hell, Famously Bad, Motion Capture Performance, Reboot
Geographical setting: Area 51
Plot point: Alternative Dimensions / Parallel universe, Origin Story, Scientific Experiment Gone Awry, Surprise Twist
Social setting: End of the World
Source material: Marvel Comics
Subgenre: Action Adventure
Time period setting: 2000s
Source:Based on Comic/Graphic Novel
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Super Hero
Production/Financing Companies: MARV Films, Kinberg Genre, Robert Kulzer, Constantin Film, Marvel Studios
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Four young outsiders teleport to an alternate and dangerous universe, which alters their physical form in shocking ways. Their lives irrevocably upended, the team must learn to harness their daunting new abilities and work together to save Earth from a former friend turned enemy.
